学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, with a consistent improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; no significant negative or positive events appeared in the reputation documents, with a stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate attention on short video platforms and no abnormal application signals.

预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the fluctuation trend of historical rankings, the basically flat enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, competition in the Physics Category in 2026 is expected to slightly intensify. Combined with the competitive pressure brought by the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is about 44171, with a range of 43671–44671.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 延边大学在河南省医学类单独招生，2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为36819、37209、38365、45456、74079，呈逐年下降趋势（位次数字增大，录取难度降低）。招生计划从202 1-2022年的6人，扩至2023年12人、2024年14人、2025年17人。2026年计划缩减至16人（缩招1人），其中护理学从10人减至6人，药学类保持4人，临床医学保持3人，新增口腔医 学3人。缩招对位次有轻微上推作用（位次数字减小），但新增热门专业口腔医学可能吸引更多高分考生报考。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学是211工程重点建设大学、国家双一流建设高校，位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州。作为综合类公办本科院校，其医学类专业在区域内具有一定影响力，211和双一流身份 对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学尤其受青睐。延边大学地处东北边疆地区，地理位置相对偏远，对河南考生而言存在一定的地域距离因素，但211层次 仍能吸引中等分数段考生。2026年新增口腔医学专业，预计会提升医学类整体报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年趋势，2026年延边大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次预测为70964名，波动区间70464-71464。相比2025年的74079，位次有所回升（更难进），主要受 缩招及新增口腔医学专业影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Yanbian University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Henan Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 36819, 37209, 38365, 45456, and 74079 respectively, showing a year-on-year downward trend (increasing ranking numbers indicate decreasing admission difficulty). The enrollment plan expanded from 6 students in 2021-2022 to 12 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 16 students (a reduction of 1), with Nursing decreasing from 10 to 6, Pharmacy remaining at 4, Clinical Medicine remaining at 3, and the addition of 3 spots for Stomatology (new). The reduction in enrollment slightly pushes the ranking upward (decreasing ranking numbers), but the addition of the popular major Stomatology may attract more high-scoring applicants.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. As a comprehensive public undergraduate institution, its medical programs have a certain influence in the region, and the 211 and Double First-Class statuses continue to attract students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being particularly favored. Yanbian University is located in the northeastern border region, which is relatively remote geographically. For Henan students, there is a certain distance factor, but the 211 level still attracts mid-range scoring students. The addition of Stomatology in 2026 is expected to increase the overall popularity of medical programs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical programs in Henan Province in 2026 is 70964, with a fluctuation range of 70464-71464. Compared to 74079 in 2025, the ranking has increased (harder to enter), mainly due to the reduction in enrollment and the addition of Stomatology.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine
- Stomatology (new in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy as the main target, use Tier 1 Clinical Medicine and Stomatology as reach options, and Tier 3 Nursing as a safety choice.
